title: Klaviyo vs GetResponse (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and GetResponse email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and which is best for your business.
h1: Klaviyo vs GetResponse: Detailed Feature & Price Comparison
intro: Both Klaviyo and GetResponse offer freemium email marketing platforms with automation capabilities, but they cater to different business types. Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce integrations and predictive analytics, while GetResponse provides a broader marketing suite including webinars and online courses. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your specific marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-commerce integrations, predictive analytics, SMS, reviews
comparison_table.tool_b: Webinars, landing pages, online courses, conversion funnels

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced product integrations
Predictive analytics and SMS marketing are priorities for your customer engagement strategy
You want a platform specifically optimized for retail and e-commerce businesses
choose_b_if: You're an online course creator, webinar host, or digital product seller
You need landing pages and sales funnel tools built into your marketing platform
Budget is a primary concern and you want to start at just $19/month

faq.a: It depends on your business model. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce brands with its specialized integrations and predictive analytics, earning higher ratings (4.6 vs 4.2 on G2). However, GetResponse excels for course creators and webinar hosts with its comprehensive suite of marketing tools. Neither is objectively 'better'—the best choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or GetResponse?
faq.a: GetResponse is significantly cheaper, starting at $19/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Both offer identical free tiers with 500 contacts, making GetResponse the more budget-friendly option for businesses just getting started or operating on tight marketing budgets.

faq.q: Can I switch from GetResponse to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically allow you to export your contact lists and email campaigns. However, the migration process and any data compatibility issues will depend on your specific implementation. It's recommended to contact both platforms' support teams before switching to ensure a smooth transition of your email automations and customer data.
